baselines.paper_or_system: Ahmed and Devanbu 2022 Few-shot project-specific code summarization
baselines.full_citation: T. Ahmed and P. Devanbu, 'Few-shot training LLMs for project-specific code summarization,' ASE 2022.
baselines.baseline_role: conceptual and reproducibility baseline for few-shot project-specific code summarization
baselines.observed_issue: Repository contains dataset and scripts from the ASE-NIER paper; full reproduction still needs local verification
baselines.decision: Use as related work and reproducibility reference

baselines.full_citation: W. U. Ahmad, S. Chakraborty, B. Ray, and K.-W. Chang, 'A Transformer-based approach for source code summarization,' ACL 2020.
baselines.baseline_role: supervised transformer baseline and reproducibility reference
baselines.observed_issue: Full reproduction may require original datasets, dependency setup, and model training/evaluation steps
baselines.decision: Use as related work and reproducibility reference

baselines.full_citation: S. Yun et al., 'P-CodeSum: Project-specific code summarization with in-context learning,' 2024.
baselines.baseline_role: closest project-specific ICL related work and reproducibility reference
baselines.observed_issue: Full reproduction may require project-specific setup, model/API configuration, and dataset preparation
baselines.decision: Use as related work and reproducibility reference
